description: Ralph Loop unified state file tracking wizard scan testing and full audit

security.notes: Re-audited 2026-02-03. CWE-78: 1 shell=True (tool_checker.py:829) with nosec B602, commands sourced from hardcoded REMEDIATION_COMMANDS dict - not user input. CWE-79: html.escape/_escape_html in reporters, trend_formatters insights are internally generated strings. CWE-89: 46+ parameterized queries, get_query_plan f-string is dev-only (no prod usage), 6 dynamic WHERE clauses use internal literals with nosec B608. CWE-22: validate_path_within_base, Path.resolve in 9 files. CWE-798: no hardcoded secrets, test fixtures only. CWE-502: no pickle/yaml.load/eval/exec. CWE-400: 165 timeout= occurrences across 39 files. 31 nosec comments all justified.

core.notes: Re-audited 2026-02-03. 443 tests passed (history_db 151@85%, dedup_enhanced 70@91%, normalize integration, config 350@93%). SQL injection audit: 46 queries verified parameterized (?), get_query_plan f-string is dev-only helper. Dynamic WHERE clauses (lines 1180-1191, 2452-2471) use internal string literals only with nosec B608 justification. WAL mode enabled for concurrency. No O(n^2) patterns found - LSH algorithm auto-selected for >500 findings.

cli.notes: Re-audited. 212 passed (jmo 65, orchestrator 52, tool_installer 94). Security: shell=False verified (1 exception tool_checker.py:829 has nosec B602), path traversal protected via validation.py+path_sanitizers.py, input validation via centralized validators. All CWE-78/22/88/400 checks pass.

adapters.notes: Re-audited 2026-02-03. 1889 passed, 92% coverage. checkov_adapter.py updated for v3.2+ array format (tested). All 29 adapters consistent: safe_load_json/ndjson_file, normalize_severity/map_tool_severity. No new issues found.

reporters.notes: Re-audited 2026-02-03. 393 passed, 1 skipped, 95% coverage. XSS: _escape_html (simple_html), json.dumps+tag escaping (html_reporter, diff_html). CSV injection: low risk (internal data, QUOTE_MINIMAL). SARIF schema: compliant. diff_md unescaped summary tag is low risk (MD processors escape).
